summary: All code_refs and source figures verify. Two minor MISCITED framing issues: (1) cli.py:308 echo_cancellation=True is on an rtc.AudioProcessingModule for local console audio, not 'room connect options' as the note claims; (2) the transcript-hold method is _should_hold_stt_event at :504, not _should_hold_event at :505+. Mechanisms in both cases are correct. No WRONG claims.
